root: ^Norman: Gosh, Yellow Bass is like all we eat around here... that's really all you got to show for today?
^Sam: Hey man, it was a slow day. Nothing I can do about it.
^Norman: You know, they used to catch so many of these you practically never had to buy food if you hung around the docks long enough.
^Norman: The fishermen always had so much they couldn't carry it all, so they'd hand them out to anyone who wanted them.
^Norman: Hook tech got better... They didn't die as soon as you pulled them up, so fishermen started just letting 'em go once they had enough for the day.
^Sam: I wish I could catch that many Yellow Bass in a day... I'd be rich.
